meta.title: How the Soviets stole the Space Shuttle
meta.description:
Although America’s space shuttle was not the budget-friendly platform it was intended to be, the program was so successful that the Soviet Union decided to build their own. Unbeknownst to most, they actually did, and it even flew in space.

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews

How the CIA hijacked a Soviet spacecraft in 1959: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-cia-hijacked-a-soviet-spacecraft-in-1959/
The Soviets crashed into the moon while Apollo 11 was on it: https://www.sandboxx.us/blog/the-soviets-crashed-into-the-moon-while-apollo-11-was-on-it/
